title: 2 in 1 Needle Threader Seam Ripper, Stretchable Seam Rippers for Sewing, Thread Remover Tool for Hand Sewing, Knitting, Cross Stitch, Embroidery and Thread Removal (Green)
features: 【2 in 1 Needle Threader Seam Ripper】Experience the innovative design of our 2-in-1 needle threader & seam ripper tool that seamlessly combines threading and seam removal, reducing eye strain and enhancing your overall sewing experience
【Durable And Reliable】Made of solid material, wear-resistant and durable. The red ball at the end of the fork protects the fabric and ensures accurate sewing every time

【Easy to Use for All Skill Levels】This user-friendly needle threader tool simplifies the threading process, allowing everyone from beginners to seasoned sewing enthusiasts to effortlessly insert threaders through the needle's eye with ease

【Telescopic Storage, Portable And Durable】Telescopic storage design protects both ends, making it easy to store and carry. Compact design extends service life and is suitable for quick maintenance and adjustments

【Perfect Addition to Your Sewing Supplies】Elevate your crafting projects with our 2 in 1 needle threader seam ripper. Ideal for sewing, knitting, cross-stitch, and embroidery, this essential needle threader enhances precision and efficiency in all your creative tasks
